docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER GREEN, ARIANNA ALEXIS HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-01-2020 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER ARIANNA GREEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
